id.description: Unique identifier for the API key

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key

key.description: The actual API key (only returned once at creation)

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to this API key

allowed_ips.description: List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges

expiry_date.description: Expiration date of the API key

created_at.description: When the API key was created

created_by.description: User who created the API key

updated_at.description: When the API key was last updated

updated_by.description: User who last updated the API key

last_used_at.description: When the API key was last used
